content.speakerText: Thanks for riding with CityTaxi! Have a great day!
content.speakerTextCn: 感谢乘坐城市出租车！祝您今天愉快！
expectedAnswers: Great service — thanks so much and have a wonderful day!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了感谢和礼貌道别
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，无中式英语
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者日常道别习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景关键词如 'thank you', 'appreciate', 'service' 等

content.speakerText: I really appreciate your help today!
content.speakerTextCn: 我真的很感谢你今天的帮助！
expectedAnswers: You're welcome! Have a safe trip!
My pleasure! Thanks for choosing CityTaxi!
Glad I could help — enjoy the rest of your day!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否恰当回应了感谢并回赠祝福
语言准确性：是否使用了正确的回应句型（如 'You're welcome', 'My pleasure'）
表达自然度：语气是否友好、不生硬，符合真实对话情境
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'welcome', 'pleasure', 'help', 'enjoy' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Thanks for the safe and punctual ride!
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你的安全准时的乘车体验！
expectedAnswers: Thank you! Safety and timeliness are our top priorities!
I'm glad I could help! Have a fantastic day!
Appreciate the feedback! Have a wonderful day ahead!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了对服务的具体评价并表达感谢
语言准确性：是否正确使用复合形容词（如 'safe and punctual'）和完整句式
表达自然度：是否体现出专业服务人员的礼貌回应风格
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'safety', 'timeliness', 'appreciate', 'wonderful day' 等核心表达
